title: 8 PCS Metal Makeup Spatula Tool, Mini Skin Care Spatula Lotion Spatula, Cosmetic Spatula Applicator, Reusable Beauty Spatula for Cream, Lotion and Mask (Silver Gold Rose Gold)
description:
About this item
Material: Our skincare spatula is made of metal, which is smooth and wear-resistant, not easy to break, strong and durable, and you can use it repeatedly for a long time
Size: The size of the makeup scraper is about 5.9 × 1.2 cm/2.32 × 0.47 inch, which is small and exquisite, easy to carry, and very suitable for applying your face cream lotion and other products
Wide application: The face spatula is very suitable for sampling, mixing your lotion, cream, mask or other skin care products, and the makeup scraper allows you to apply these cosmetics more evenly, long-term repeated use, and easy to clean
Practical: The skin spatula is very light and easy to carry. It is very convenient to carry with you when traveling on business trips. Using it can free your hands to take face creams, masks, etc. There is a small hole at the end of the spoon, which can be hung when you are not using it
Package includes: You will receive 8 cosmetic scrapers in three colors, sufficient quantity to meet your daily replacement needs, and you can also share with your family and friends
